reason: Check final changes against global RVV-first Stage2 scope and authority rules.

Check RVV provider-owned computed-mask strided-input widening dot-reduce validation, direct contraction owner consumption, selected-body realization, mirror-only artifact metadata, and fail-closed diagnostics.
Check common EmitC/export remain neutral and consume provider-built routes only.
Check generated-bundle dry-run, ssh rvv correctness claims, focused regressions, and authority scans.
Verify runtime counts, generated harness oracle, evidence JSON, and ssh rvv execution behavior for explicit and pre-realized modes.
Verify explicit dry-run FileCheck coverage includes n=0/small/exact/tail counts and strided masked signed dot oracle markers.
Verify pre-realized dry-run FileCheck coverage includes n=0/small/exact/tail counts and body-consumption evidence.
Verify explicit selected-body artifact mirrors provider facts without route-authority drift.
Verify pre-realized artifact mirrors provider facts and no pre-realized body survives realization.
Verify focused C++ provider/fail-closed coverage remains valid after changes.
